rationale: The citing paper is explicitly a commentary on the cited work: its title is “Comments on Conjoint Analysis with Partial Profiles,” and the note states it is a conceptual comment on Bradlow, Hu, and Ho (2004), summarizing their Bayesian learning framework and critiquing unresolved issues.
